item.title: Return of the Meme (1657): albatross artillery
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Not nearly enough Dune and The Dark Tower crossovers. (Really, not enough Dark Tower memes to begin with.)
Yeah, I feel it.
One of these three has arrived, and is singing here. No sign of Hepatic Tanager or Blue Grosbeak yet, but the Lucy's Warblers are singing everywhere. Fun fact: they are one of only two Warblers that nest in tree cavities.
In small doses, but i do like my isolated birding time where it's just me and the birds in the middle of nowhere, not the people I've dragged along on my jeep tour. Incidentally, my year list for Yavapai County now sits at 133 species as of yesterday.
Mood
The Bone Wars.
WHY?!
Tiffany Aching and the Chalk (GNU STP) Can't remember the artist and I don't have time to track it down before work, I'm sorry. I still have to shower, dress, feed The Pippin, make coffee, change out the stones within a rock tumbler, get water from my fridge...
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "You're a good boy!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Oh shit
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: The last words of Thorin Oakenshield
item.description:
This is a look at the profound message by the king to the burglar in The Hobbit.
Thorin and Bilbo Baggins had parted on unfriendly terms at the gate of the Lonely Mountain, as Thorin was consumed by greed for its treasure hoard (art by Alan Lee).
Next day occurred the Battle of the Five Armies when two hosts of Orcs and Wargs attacked, forcing the Dwarves to ally with Men and Elves. The unexpected allies won the day but not before the Dwarf-king had fallen (art by Lucas Graciano).
After the battle Bilbo was brought into a tent by the Wizard Gandalf, to meet the old dwarf ere it was too late (The Hobbit; XVIII onwards, art by Darrell Sweet with edits): “There indeed lay Thorin Oakenshield, wounded with many wounds, and his rent armour and notched axe were cast upon the floor.”
Thorin greeted the thief and told that he would pass on to the halls of his forefathers, thus leaving “all gold and silver, and go where it is of little worth”; and that he regretted his words and deeds at the gate (art by Jef Murray).
“Bilbo knelt on one knee filled with sorrow. `Farewell, King under the Mountain!´ he said. `This is a bitter adventure, if it must end so; and not a mountain of gold can amend it. Yet I am glad that I have shared in your perils - that has been more than any Baggins deserves.´”
“`Oh my god!´ said Thorin. `I am never gonna financially recover from this. Farewell!´” Then Bilbo turned away, and sat alone wrapped in a blanket, and wept until his eyes were red and his voice was hoarse. He was a kindly little soul.
Happy April's Fools
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: In Memoriam.
item.description: This is really hard to post. Last week I ran a fan poll asking what big change you wanted for the Litterbox Family. I expected something silly like “They win the lottery!” or “More jokes about cheese!” Instead… you overwhelmingly voted for “Fran dies.” I’m honestly kind of stunned. I didn’t think that option would actually win. Fran has been such a huge part of this comic for years, so this one hurts. -But the comic most go on! I guess at least "Catty McCatface" didn't win. What does that even mean?!
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.dc:creator: Headcase444

item.title: Ghost in the Shell expo in Tokyo
item.description: Source : https://www.instagram.com/reel/DWjWAMMBpJc/ I shot a few videos about the Ghost in the Shell expo currently opened in Tokyo. Lots of comments on my last posts asked to see more of it so here's a little part of it, the first room of the expo was this gorgeous ambient installation that showcased intro songs of every franchise titles. I also filmed other parts of the expo let me know if you'd like to see more! There was also an AR experience with Tachikoma guiding you through the expo, anyone interested in seeing footage of that? Let me know! Have a good day everyone :) YuzuPyon
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: GovBrief Today #425
item.description: Donald Trump announced plans to attend oral arguments at the Supreme Court on Wednesday, the first sitting president on record to do so, as the justices hear his administration's challenge to the Fourteenth Amendment. Today, three federal judges drew lines he wasn't expecting. Judge Leon, a Bush appointee, halted the $400 million White House ballroom and told Trump he is the steward of the building, not the owner. An Obama appointee permanently blocked his defunding of NPR and PBS as unconstitutional. And one of Trump's own appointees struck down his attempt to rig homeless housing grants with political loyalty tests. His response to a day of judicial rebuke is to go sit in the room where the biggest constitutional question of his presidency will be argued and dare the justices to look at him. The norms he's broken have always been grounded in law he chose to disregard. The courts reminded him of those laws today, and they'll have the chance to do it again Wednesday. Tell your senators through Resistbot and 5 Calls that the judiciary is holding him accountable and Congress needs to do the same, especially with a national address tonight about the war he started. We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 425 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260331-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar31 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/war-address [3] https://go.govbrief.today/gulf-drilling-exempt [4] https://go.govbrief.today/forest-service-hq [5] https://go.govbrief.today/national-voter-list [6] https://go.govbrief.today/npr-pbs-funding [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-reporter-fresh [8] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-helicopter [9] https://go.govbrief.today/doj-immigration-shift [10] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-injunction [11] https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-conversion-therapy [12] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-attend-scotus [13] https://go.govbrief.today/hud-grant-unlawful [14] https://go.govbrief.today/warehouse-pause [15] https://go.govbrief.today/daca-deportee [16] https://go.govbrief.today/penn-jewish-employees [17] https://go.govbrief.today/graham-disney [18] https://go.govbrief.today/reflecting-pool [19] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-agent-suit Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Last day of March Dumpy Doo
item.description:
Maybe they're prosthetics
"Gary" also is a name
♫♪ Wish we could turn back time, to the good old daaaaayyyys ♪♫
Absolutely devious.
HE IS THE TRUEST VOICE ACTOR
it's because I don't apply myself
devious
just use some steam
I'm 5'9"... AND A HALF.
♪♫ hot cross buns, hot cross buns ♪♫
Well he's not wrong
At last we will reveal ourselves to the Jedi... at last we shall have revenge
can't we just do what they did the first time?
What's up... oh.
You can do it, put your back into it
"but it's not funded with taxpayer money!"
The good ol' days
when am I NOT in The Pit of Despair?
dafuq is HE doing here?!?
and they've tucked their truck nuts safely away
baby firsty
and you have the AUDACITY to make shadow puppets.
and it's also the one hogging all the RAM
also based on a true story
three years sober, i miss it. maybe it's a three year dry spell? meh. i don't miss the taste (aside from a cold beer on a hot day, or a glass of wine with a juicy steak), but i miss the way it made my brain function. haven't found anything else that does that :/
item.dc:creator: ddubya42
